content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 14, 2003

Gregory F. Zerovnik
Director, Marketing & External Relations
Rio Hondo College
3600 Workman Mill Road
Whittier, CA 90601

Re: Our File No. W-03-018

Dear Mr. Zerovnik:

This correspondence is written notification that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your January 30, 2003, request for written advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act. As your question now relates to past conduct, we are unable to provide you with a written response. (See § 83114, subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A), copy enclosed.)

I apologize for our inability to generate a response prior to your public distribution of the Rio Hondo College newsletter at issue.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
Kenneth L. Glick
Counsel, Legal Division

KLG:jg
I:/AdviceLtrs/03-018a
Enclosure
